instruction: For a certain county, the percentage, $P$, of voters who used electronic voting systems, such as optical scans, in national elections can be modeled by the formula P=3x+20.9, where $x$ is the number of years after 2001. In which years will more than 53.9\% of the county's voters use electronic systems? Note: Enter your answer as, Voting years after yyyy--do not put a period at the end of the phrase. Answer: [ANS]
